subcodes.title: Words to Anna Kunz, spoken on 1921-03-27
subcodes.first_line: I was very glad to hear of your coming. When all the people are negligent you have been chosen by God.... In their heavenly books the prophets have spoken of the Day of the Lord
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @Mount Carmel
